items.title: Beyond Siri: Practical AI Features Coming to iPhone in iOS 27
items.summary: Apple is set to introduce a suite of practical AI features in iOS 27, moving beyond basic voice assistants to enhance user experience on iPhones.

items.title: Trump Administration's Potential Crackdown on Anthropic: Who Benefits?
items.summary: An analysis explores the potential beneficiaries and implications if the Trump administration were to crack down on leading AI firm Anthropic.

items.title: Samsung Electronics Integrates ChatGPT and Codex for Employee Use
items.summary: Samsung Electronics has announced the deployment of OpenAI's ChatGPT and Codex to its employees, signaling a major enterprise adoption of advanced AI tools.

items.title: HumanScale: Egocentric Human Video Outperforms Real-Robot Data for Embodied Pretraining
items.summary: New research suggests that using egocentric human video data can be more effective than real-robot data for pretraining embodied AI models, potentially accelerating robot learning.

items.title: Context-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
items.summary: A new paper introduces context-aware reinforcement learning techniques designed to improve the performance and adaptability of agentic and multimodal large language models.

items.title: Thinking with Visual Grounding: Enhancing AI's Understanding
items.summary: Researchers explore how integrating visual grounding can significantly improve an AI's ability to 'think' and reason about its environment.

items.title: OpenAI Launches New Academy Courses for Applying AI at Work
items.summary: OpenAI has introduced new courses through its Academy, aimed at equipping professionals with the skills to effectively apply AI in various work environments.

items.title: Google Expands AI Infrastructure with New Investments in Alabama
items.summary: Google is strengthening its presence in Alabama with new investments aimed at bolstering its AI infrastructure and supporting local communities.

items.title: Preply Leverages AI and Human Tutors for Personalized Learning Experiences
items.summary: Preply demonstrates how it combines artificial intelligence with human tutoring to create highly personalized and effective learning pathways for its users.

items.title: In the Weights: A New AI-Centric Vanity Search Tool Launched
items.summary: A new service called 'In the Weights' has launched, offering an AI-centric vanity search experience for users interested in their digital footprint.

items.title: Goose Offers Free Alternative to Claude Code's $200/Month Service
items.summary: Goose is positioning itself as a free alternative to Claude Code, claiming to provide similar functionalities that typically cost up to $200 per month.

items.title: LedgerAgent: Structured State for Policy-Adherent Tool-Calling Agents
items.summary: A new research paper introduces LedgerAgent, a framework that provides structured state management for AI agents to adhere to policies when using external tools.

items.title: Freeing the Law with LOCUS: A Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States
items.summary: Researchers have created LOCUS, a large-scale corpus of local ordinances across the United States, designed to facilitate AI applications in legal research and analysis.

items.title: LegalHalluLens: Auditing and Calibrated Multi-Agent Debate for Trustworthy Legal AI
items.summary: LegalHalluLens proposes a system for auditing and mitigating hallucinations in legal AI through typed hallucination detection and calibrated multi-agent debate, aiming for more trustworthy legal applications.

items.title: Rethinking Shrinkage Bias in LLM FP4 Pretraining: Geometric Origin, Systemic Impact, and UFP4 Recipe
items.summary: This paper delves into the geometric origins and systemic impact of shrinkage bias in FP4 pretraining for LLMs, proposing a new UFP4 recipe to mitigate its effects.
